.file-embed.background: rgb(24, 21, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(24, 21, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(81, 0, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(122, 0, 65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(122, 0, 65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(24, 21, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(123, 90, 7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(24, 21, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(24, 21, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(24, 21, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(35, 31, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(81, 0, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
